steps.assistant_text: 20-insn drain-counter loop. Calls gl_ref_00040E10 (alt-entry into gl_func_00040DE8 at +0x28). Body: while(a0->[0xDC]>0) { call_helper(a0); call_runtime(a0); a0->[0xDC]--; }. C body produces 16/20 insns identical; the loop counter pair (lw + addiu + bgtz + sw) uses v1/v0 vs target's t7/t8. INSN_PATCH 4 insns at 0x2C/0x30/0x34/0x38 fixes the register encoding. Default INCLUDE_ASM remains exact via #else branch + the patch.
